name: CallAction
description: Pill call-to-action: a leading icon + label on a solid brand surface, sized as a primary tap target. Icon + label are bound fields and INHERIT the button colour, so a Ref tone override (style.background/color) recolours both. References tokens only.
whenToUse: The primary voice CTA (e.g. Start Call / Join). Compose via a Ref, mapping `icon` + `label` to host fields + an action; override `style` for a non-brand tone.
